responsibilities: Developed responsive user interfaces and interactive components
Optimized web applications for maximum speed and scalability
Collaborated with backend teams to integrate RESTful and GraphQL APIs

achievementTemplates: Built reusable [Component] using [Technology], improving load times by [Metric] for [Users].
Developed responsive layouts with [Technology], boosting conversion rate by [Metric].

experienceQuestions.question: Engineered reusable React components to save development time?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Engineered a reusable UI component library using React and TypeScript, reducing overall project frontend development cycles by 30%.

experienceQuestions.question: Optimized Core Web Vitals to increase landing conversions?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Reduced initial paint and LCP load times by 42% through lazy loading, code splitting, and image optimization.

experienceQuestions.question: Implemented mobile-first layouts raising user engagement?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Developed responsive, accessible mobile-first interfaces using Tailwind CSS, increasing user engagement by 25%.

experienceQuestions.question: Managed state stores reducing server load and rendering lag?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Implemented a centralized global state store, minimizing redundant API requests by 50%.

experienceQuestions.question: Engineered accessible UI elements meeting WCAG standard regulations?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Audited and refactored UI components to achieve WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance, broadening customer reach by 12%.

experienceQuestions.question: Wrote unit/integration tests to reduce frontend production bugs?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Authored comprehensive unit and integration tests using Jest and React Testing Library, reducing user-reported UI bugs by 35%.

projectQuestions.question: Structured modular frontend architecture for the project?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Architected clean multi-page structures using Next.js App Router, enabling decoupled component rendering routes.

projectQuestions.question: Integrated REST or GraphQL APIs into the code?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Integrated RESTful APIs and state management stores, ensuring low-latency data rendering and synchronization.

projectQuestions.question: Implemented Tailwind CSS or visual tokens in project files?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Designed modular utility-first interfaces with custom Tailwind stylesheets, standardizing responsive breakpoints.

projectQuestions.question: Deployed and hosted the application using Vercel or Netlify?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Deployed build-optimized production bundles to Vercel, configuring automated preview branches for GitHub commits.

projectQuestions.question: Built smooth interactive animations using Framer Motion?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Integrated hardware-accelerated transitions via Framer Motion, enhancing interactive button states.

projectQuestions.question: Configured custom meta tags and robots.txt files for SEO?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Optimized project SEO configurations including server-rendered meta descriptors, boosting search index visibility.
